prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约25941→26058→23710→29369→28088，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约28088名；本省理科/物理类计划20 21–2023年均为75人，2024年增至102人，2025年106人；2026年计划142人，较2025年大幅扩招约34%，扩招幅度显著，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一 流建设高校；软科主榜排名2021年第63位，近年稳定在第75位左右，排名略有下降但仍属中上水平；该校近年未出现明显负面舆情事件，声誉评价平稳；抖音学 校热度未进入前100名，短视频平台关注度一般，未见异常报考信号；该校传统优势在地质学、地质资源与地质工程等 领域，相关专业招生计划占比较大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业持续高热推荐，对高分考生吸引力强；河南省2026年高考总报名人 数约120万，较2025年约90.7万大幅增加约32%，物理类考生估算约73.4万，竞争加剧；学校位于北京，对河南考生属跨省 报考，地域吸引力稳定；该校在河南招生规模较大，2026年物理类计划142人，属该校在各省份中招生人数较多的省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（+34%）缓解 竞争、但河南省考生总数大幅增加（+32%）加剧竞争的双向作用，两者基本抵消；同时计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热吸引高分考生，对整体位次有上移压力。在2025年基 准28088名基础上，预计2026年最低位次约33612名，区间33112–34112名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 25941 → 26058 → 23710 → 29369 → 28088, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a baseline of about 28088 in 2025; the provincial science/physics category plan was 75 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 102 in 2024, and 106 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 142, a significant expansion of about 34% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 63rd in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking in 2021, stable around 75th in recent years, slightly declined but still in the upper-middle tier; no significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years, reputation evaluation stable; Douyin university popularity not in the top 100, short video platform attention average, no abnormal application signals; traditional strengths in geology, geological resources and geological engineering, with related majors accounting for a large proportion of enrollment plans.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to be highly sought after, attracting high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan college entrance examination is about 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% from about 907,000 in 2025, with an estimated 734,000 physics category candidates, intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, cross-provincial application for Henan candidates, regional attraction stable; the university has a large enrollment scale in Henan, with 142 physics category places in 2026, making it one of the provinces with higher enrollment numbers.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two-way effect of significant expansion in 2026 (+34%) easing competition, but a substantial increase in total Henan candidates (+32%) intensifying competition, they basically offset each other; meanwhile, popular majors like computer science and electronic information continue to attract high-scoring candidates, exerting upward pressure on overall ranking. Based on the 2025 baseline of 28088, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 33612, with a range of 33112–34112.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 33112–34112, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 popular majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., below 33112), you can focus on Tier 1 popular majors such as computer science, artificial intelligence, and electronic information; if your ranking is close to the lower limit, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors like mathematics and geological engineering to ensure admission.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
